segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Hello.
segments.zh: 你好，这里是儿童工程讲习班。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Children's Engineering Workshops.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Oh hello.
segments.zh: 哦你好，我想了解一些关于学校假期讲习班的信息。

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: I wanted some information about the workshops in the school holidays.

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: I have two daughters who are interested.
segments.zh: 我有两个女儿感兴趣。小女儿叫莉迪亚，她四岁——你们收这么小的孩子吗？

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: The younger one's Lydia, she's four – do you take children as young as that?

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Yes, our Tiny Engineers workshop is for four to five-year-olds.
segments.zh: 收的，我们的“小小工程师”讲习班就是针对四到五岁孩子的。

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: What sorts of activities do they do?
segments.zh: 他们做哪些活动？

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: All sorts.
segments.zh: 各种活动。比如，他们一起设计一个包裹鸡蛋的特殊外壳，这样鸡蛋在里面时，从高处扔下来也不会碎。嗯，有时候也会碎，但这也是乐趣的一部分！

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: For example, they work together to design a special cover that goes round an egg, so that when it's inside they can drop it from a height and it doesn't break.

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Well, sometimes it does break but that's part of the fun!

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。莉迪亚喜欢搭东西。有没有机会让她做这个？

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: And Lydia loves building things.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Is there any opportunity for her to do that?

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Well, they have a competition to see who can make the highest tower.
segments.zh: 嗯，他们有个比赛，看谁能搭出最高的塔。你会惊讶他们能搭多高。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: You'd be amazed how high they can go.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: But they're learning all the time as well as having fun.
segments.zh: 但他们一直在学习，同时也玩得很开心。比如，他们做的一件事就是设计和制造一辆连接着气球的汽车，气球里的空气产生的力实际上驱动着汽车，让它向前移动。它们跑得也很快。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: For example, one thing they do is to design and build a car that's attached to a balloon, and the force of the air in that actually powers the car and makes it move along.

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: They go really fast too.

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: OK, well, all this sounds perfect.
segments.zh: 好的，嗯，这一切听起来都很棒。

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Now Carly, that's my older daughter, has just had her seventh birthday, so presumably she'd be in a different group?
segments.zh: 现在卡莉，我的大女儿，刚过完七岁生日，所以她应该在一个不同的组吧？

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Yes, she'd be in the Junior Engineers.
segments.zh: 是的，她会在初级工程师组。那是针对六到八岁孩子的。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: That's for children from six to eight.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: And do they do the same sorts of activities?
segments.zh: 他们做同样类型的活动吗？

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Some are the same, but a bit more advanced.
segments.zh: 有些是一样的，但更高级一些。所以他们学习如何建造模型车辆，比如汽车和卡车，但也学习如何使用同样的材料和技术来建造动物，然后他们学习如何编程让它们动起来。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: So they work out how to build model vehicles, things like cars and trucks, but also how to construct animals using the same sorts of material and technique, and then they learn how they can program them and make them move.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: So they learn a bit of coding?
segments.zh: 所以他们学一点编程？

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: They do.
segments.zh: 是的。他们学得很快。如果需要帮助，我们会在旁边指导，但他们也会互相学习。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: They pick it up really quickly.

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: We're there to help if they need it, but they learn from one another too.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。那他们也有比赛吗？

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: And do they have competitions too?

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Yes, with the Junior Engineers, it's to use recycled materials like card and wood to build a bridge, and the longest one gets a prize.
segments.zh: 是的，在少年工程师项目中，他们要用纸板、木头等回收材料建造一座桥，最长的那座桥能获奖。

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: That sounds fun.
segments.zh: 听起来很有趣。我自己都想试试！

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: I wouldn't mind doing that myself!

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Then they have something a bit different, which is to think up an idea for a five-minute movie and then film it, using special animation software.
segments.zh: 然后他们还有一个稍微不同的项目，就是构思一个五分钟的电影创意，然后用特殊的动画软件拍摄出来。你会惊讶于他们的创意。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: You'd be amazed what they come up with.

segments.speaker: FATHER
segments.en: And of course, that's something they can put on their phone and take home to show all their friends.
segments.zh: 当然，他们可以把这些存到手机里带回家给朋友们看。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: Exactly.
segments.zh: 没错。然后他们还会建造一个人形机器人，装饰并编程，让它的胳膊和腿能动。

segments.speaker: SARAH
segments.en: And then they also build a robot in the shape of a human, and they decorate it and program it so that it can move its arms and legs.

items.prompt: Create a cover for an 1 so they can drop it from a height without breaking it.

pairs.note: 题干和原文都是cover，直接对应。
题干中的1代表缺失词，原文是egg，所以答案就是egg。

pairs.q: drop it from a height without breaking it
pairs.p: drop it from a height and it doesn't break
pairs.note: 题干和原文意思相同，只是表述略有不同。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接描述了设计一个覆盖物包裹鸡蛋，然后从高处扔下不碎，与题干完全对应，所以答案就是egg。

items.prompt: Take part in a competition to build the tallest 2 .

pairs.note: build 替换为 make，tallest 替换为 highest，意思相同。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的'build the tallest'对应原文的'make the highest'，'competition'原词复现，由此定位到答案'tower'。

items.prompt: Make a 3 powered by a balloon.

pairs.q: Make a 3 powered by a balloon
pairs.p: design and build a car that's attached to a balloon, and the force of the air in that actually powers the car
pairs.note: 题干中的'Make a 3'对应原文的'design and build a car'，'powered by a balloon'对应原文的'powered by a balloon'，但原文更详细地描述了气球如何驱动汽车。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求制作一个由气球驱动的3，但原文中说的是'design and build a car'，所以答案应该是car。

items.prompt: Build model cars, trucks and 4 and learn how to program them so they can move.

pairs.note: 题干中的cars, trucks与原文中的cars and trucks完全对应。
题干中的'4'是题号，实际答案应为'animals'，与原文中'animals'对应。

pairs.q: learn how to program them so they can move
pairs.p: learn how they can program them and make them move
pairs.note: 题干中的'learn how to program them so they can move'与原文中的'learn how they can program them and make them move'基本一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到build model vehicles, things like cars and trucks, but also how to construct animals，然后说learn how they can program them and make them move，因此答案应为animals。

items.prompt: Take part in a competition to build the longest 5 using card and wood.

pairs.note: 比赛对应获奖，暗示竞争关系
原文直接出现'longest'，与题干完全一致

pairs.p: use recycled materials like card and wood
pairs.note: 原文逐字出现'card and wood'

paraphrase.explain: 题干问参加比赛用卡纸和木头建造最长的什么，定位句中明确说用回收材料如卡纸和木头建造桥，最长者获奖，因此答案应为bridge。

items.prompt: Create a short 6 with special software.

pairs.note: 题干中的short对应原文中的five-minute，表示短片。
题干中的special software在原文中几乎原样出现，只是多了animation一词。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'think up an idea for a five-minute movie and then film it, using special animation software'，其中five-minute对应short，think up and film对应create，special animation software对应special software，因此答案应为movie或film。

items.prompt: Build, 7 and program a humanoid robot.

pairs.note: 题干中的build在原文中直接出现，是原词复现。
题干中的数字7对应原文中的decorate，因为题目要求填入一个动词，decorate是正确答案。
题干中的program在原文中直接出现，是原词复现。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到build a robot, decorate it and program it，其中decorate是题干中缺失的第7个步骤，因此答案填decorate。

items.prompt: Held on 8 from 10 am to 11 am
